nodes.title: Temporary
widgets_values:
masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, 8k, absurdres, sharp focus, cinematic lighting, intricate details,
 
a stunning 20-year-old gothic lolita girl with red-green heterochromia and large breast, left eye bright purple crystal with strong highlight, right eye deep caramel brown, seductive playful expression, hands placed on the abdomen, slight pout and sweet smile,

long flowing white hair with soft volume, thick blunt bangs, low twin tails tied with large black bows and small black devil horns, massive dark blue and purple rose hair accessory with white lace and pearl chains on the right side, multiple black cross hair clips and silver chains on left,

extremely elaborate black and royal blue gothic lolita dress, off-shoulder design, huge blue-black butterfly bow on chest, massive layered puffy sleeves with triple black lace frills, black leather corset waist, multi-layered ruffled skirt with shiny blue satin top layer, black lace underlayers, silver-purple pearl chains and sequins trim, white lace petticoat visible, black satin ribbons and criss-cross straps at hem,

dreamy cyberpunk lolita bedroom background, vibrant pink and blue neon lights, glowing neon tubes, sparkling pink tinsel curtain with bokeh, white shelves filled with colorful toys and orange drink, big bouquet of yellow sunflowers in foreground, volumetric neon lighting, colorful rim light and highlights on skin and fabric, high saturation, cinematic color grading, magical atmosphere



-----------------------



a woman, portrait, same face, preserve facial features, identical face, realistic skin, same biknin,
A model stands on the beach, wearing a bandeau green lace bikini and fishnet stockings.
